title: Product Manager (Tech)
description: Product Managers (Tech) are responsible for the strategy, roadmap, and feature definition of a technology product or product line. They bridge the gap between business, technology, and user experience, ensuring the product meets market needs and achieves business goals.
content: In India, Product Managers in tech companies work closely with engineering, design, and marketing teams. They conduct market research, analyze user data, define product specifications, and prioritize features. They need strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills. The role is increasingly in demand in India's growing tech sector, especially in startups and multinational corporations.

financialFeasibility.note: While a strong educational background is essential, scholarships and educational loans are available, making this career accessible to motivated individuals from middle-class backgrounds. Experience and skills are highly valued.

sectorScore.remarks: Primarily a private sector role in tech companies, startups, and multinational corporations. Government opportunities are limited to roles in digital transformation initiatives.

relatedCareers.reason: Analyzes business needs and translates them into technical requirements.
relatedCareers.title: Business Analyst

relatedCareers.reason: Develops and implements the technical solutions defined by the product manager.
relatedCareers.title: Software Engineer

relatedCareers.reason: Promotes and positions the product in the market.
relatedCareers.title: Marketing Manager

genderDistribution.note: While still male-dominated, there's a growing number of women in product management roles in India, with companies actively promoting diversity.
